name: Self-Radiance Agent Runtime Safety Kit — Working Implementations
description: Open-source, MIT-licensed, locally runnable tools for agent accountability: enforcement, before-action gating, supply-chain intake, bonded agents, and adversarial validation.

tools.name: AgentGate
tools.description: Collateralized execution gate for AI agents: signed Ed25519 identities, bond-and-slash settlement, dual-control malicious resolution. The substrate under everything below.

tools.name: MCP Firewall
tools.description: Governance proxy between MCP clients and upstream servers; verifies observed filesystem effects instead of trusting upstream-reported success.

tools.name: Governed WriteFile Demo
tools.description: Minimal reference path: one governed write_file call through AgentGate + MCP Firewall with on-disk verification.

tools.name: Delegation Identity Proof
tools.description: Checkpoint-managed delegation with scoped resource limits, local transparency log, and tamper-evident hash chain.

tools.name: Rollback Receipt
tools.description: Snapshots declared files before an AI coding-agent mutation; produces an inspectable rollback receipt and deterministic restore path.

tools.name: Work Session Ledger
tools.description: Assembles an inspectable receipt of an AI coding-agent work session from declared local artifacts.

tools.name: x402 Spend Receipt
tools.description: Local policy gate for x402 payment intents: deterministic spend rules plus Ed25519-signed, hash-chained allow/deny receipts with machine-readable reason codes. Also on npm as x402-spend-receipt.

tools.name: ActionProof
tools.description: Deterministic allow/deny evaluation of JSON intent for credentialed side-effecting requests (send_email, form_submit, pay_invoice) before execution.

tools.name: Reapproval Gate
tools.description: Evaluates a proposed agent action against human-approved scope; returns allow, deny, or reapproval_required on escalation thresholds.

tools.name: ContextGate
tools.description: Checks subagent claims against evidence fixtures before they enter parent agent context; quarantines unsupported claims.

tools.name: Agent Intent Ledger
tools.description: Flags drift between an original human request, the agent's plan, and a later proposed action.

tools.name: Policy Conflict Receipt
tools.description: Compares a proposed agent action against declared policy constraints and emits a conflict receipt before execution.

tools.name: Agent Interrupt Receipt
tools.description: Compares an active work order, a human interrupt, and a proposed action; emits an interrupt receipt before execution.

tools.name: SecretBoundary
tools.description: Deterministic local policy gate for one outbound action (send_webhook), default deny.

tools.name: SkillGate
tools.description: Static inspection of an agent Skill package before harness admission: instruction surface, execution surface, no execution or trust.

tools.name: MCP Server Intake
tools.description: Static pre-admission inspection of a local MCP server package: tool surface, execution surfaces, capability signals, without running it.

tools.name: MCP Config Inventory
tools.description: Read-only CLI that inventories configured MCP servers from config files and diffs snapshots for drift.

tools.name: Governed Repo Intake
tools.description: Targeted discovery and deterministic classification of a repo's instruction surfaces with explicit human acknowledgment gating.

tools.name: Dependency Drift Gate
tools.description: Compares package.json state before and after an AI coding-agent session; emits a drift report with conservative review labels.

tools.name: Agent 001: File Transform
tools.category: Bonded Agents (proofs on the AgentGate substrate)
tools.description: Bonded CSV-to-JSON agent with deterministic SHA-256 verification; bond released on match, slashed on mismatch.

tools.name: Agent 002: File Guardian
tools.category: Bonded Agents (proofs on the AgentGate substrate)
tools.description: Background watcher that bonds every file change; failed verification slashes the bond and restores from snapshot.

tools.name: Agent 003: Email Rewriter
tools.category: Bonded Agents (proofs on the AgentGate substrate)
tools.description: Bonded LLM rewriting settled by human judgment: approve releases, reject slashes.

tools.name: Agent 007: Email Triage
tools.category: Bonded Agents (proofs on the AgentGate substrate)
tools.description: Bonded inbox triage judgment; exact human agreement releases the bond, any override slashes it.

tools.name: Agent 004: Red Team Simulator
tools.description: External adversarial probing of AgentGate over HTTP, scaling from static attacks to coordinated swarms and sleeper-agent campaigns.

tools.name: Agent 005: Recursive Verifier
tools.description: Generates and executes sandboxed verification scripts; executable proof instead of opinion-based review.

tools.name: Agent 006: Incentive Wargame
tools.description: Runs AI-generated adversarial strategies against economic rule sets to test whether incentive designs survive.

tools.name: Epistemic Poisoning Simulator
tools.description: Saboteur agent poisons a shared knowledge base; measures whether corrupted information flips a bonded target agent's decisions.

tools.name: MemLedger
tools.description: Treats agent memory as testimony: append-only claims with provenance, confidence moved only by logged outcomes, memory-use receipts.

tools.name: x402 Paid Endpoint
tools.description: Live Cloudflare Worker selling one machine-readable artifact for $1 USDC on Base mainnet via the x402 v2 'exact' scheme. First verified zero-human machine purchase settled on-chain (tx 0x8eb11a825de048ec5e140ad3c8bd26f315db2abb8ecda24ea39fbf1ebd8cc4fd). Reference buyer in-repo, payment-gated by x402-spend-receipt.
